# IOUSBHostAbortOption.asynchronous

**Case**

The option to abort input/output requests asynchronously.

## Declaration

```swift
case asynchronous
```

## Options

- **IOUSBHostAbortOption.synchronous**: The option to abort input/output requests synchronously.
